name: Chili Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Fresh spinach or broccoli, chopped
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sarah Heller Preparation Time: 1:30
1. Cut the pasta sheets into pieces and unroll each piece to fit the baking dish.
2. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Cook the pasta sheets for 1 minute each, then transfer to cold water until all are cooked. Keep in cold water.
3. In a bowl, mix Chili 2000 and Fromage blanc.
4. In another bowl, combine mushrooms, sweet onions, and red pepper.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F.
6. Grease or butter a baking dish (approximately 11" x 9" x 2").
7. Place a layer of pasta on the bottom of the dish.
8. Spread a layer of the chili mixture over the pasta.
9. Top with one-third of the vegetable mixture and one-third of the Asiago cheese.
10. Repeat layers with remaining pasta sheets, vegetables, and Asiago cheese.
11. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 to 40 minutes or until golden brown.
12. Remove from oven and let sit for 10 minutes before serving.
